message:
feat(dashboard): add activity feed infrastructure

Add ActivityFeed type that maintains a rolling log of recent events
for the dashboard. Supports:
- Recording events with automatic ID generation and timestamps
- Size limiting (oldest events evicted when max size reached)
- WebSocket broadcasting via optional Hub integration
- Helper methods for common VM events (started, stopped, failed, snapshot)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
